title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is an AI coding workflow platform that integrates with Jira to automatically generate pull requests from tickets. Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter that enables ticket-to-PR generation with dedicated conversation threads per ticket.
